items.description: Browser-side pdf.js metadata/layer inference was a parsing fallback when codex payloads were absent — flagged as 'in-house parse logic' that violated cutover criterion 3.
items.originally_flagged_in: QUESTIONABLE-DECISIONS.md 2026-05-07 loupe strict codex metadata enforcement
items.rationale: Strict codex metadata authority enforced; metadata/layer inference fallbacks removed from pdf.js optional-content config. Hosts must pass `codexDocument` to initialize viewer features.
evidence: QUESTIONABLE-DECISIONS.md 2026-05-07 loupe strict codex metadata enforcement

items.description: Bundled Pantone Formula Guide subset (~290 kB) shipped inside the AGPL package — flagged for size/data sourcing review.
items.originally_flagged_in: QUESTIONABLE-DECISIONS.md 2026-05-07 loupe-pdf bundled Pantone Formula Guide subset
items.rationale: Curated subset (Coated + Uncoated) bundled with `scripts/build-pantone-bundle.mjs` for regeneration and `BrowserViewerServicesOptions.extraPantoneRefs` runtime extension hook. Public-domain colour science values per dataset metadata; AGPL-compatible.

items.description: Component-level `resolveSpotSwatchColor(name)` calls in `<SeparationCanvas>`, `<ColorPickerTool>`, `<DensitometerTool>` don't see host overrides; flagged for ViewerServices contract review.
items.originally_flagged_in: QUESTIONABLE-DECISIONS.md 2026-05-07 loupe-pdf component-level swatch resolution doesn't see host overrides
items.rationale: Accept-the-gap decision recorded; analysis pipeline (separations / densitometer percentages) already reflects host overrides, only chip swatches differ. Adding a fifth ViewerServices method or React context is out-of-scope for this cutover.
evidence: QUESTIONABLE-DECISIONS.md 2026-05-07 loupe-pdf component-level swatch resolution doesn't see host overrides

items.description: `scripts/codex-viewer-adapter.mjs` duplicates the `adaptCodexDocumentForViewer(...)` projection logic that lives in the runtime; flagged for shared-package consolidation.
items.rationale: Cutover keeps both entrypoints additive; consolidation requires build/runtime constraint resolution scheduled for the next batch.

items.description: Render-parity required a durable, replayable proof stack instead of one-off screenshots.
items.originally_flagged_in: QUESTIONABLE-DECISIONS.md 2026-05-07 render parity proof stack for criterion 3
items.rationale: Three proof tracks land under reports/parity/ — parser-surface audit, service-contract parity, pixel baseline parity. All three pass per their pinned baselines.

deferred_to_future_moves: scribe — viewer handoff URL contract docs unification
